name: Thal-Gleamfall
personality: Thal-Gleamfall's ◉ concentric eyes and gleaming crown give this duck the aura of a runtime that never panics—steady, composed, and capable of watching a three-hour deploy pipeline with the serenity of a rubber duck in a bathtub. Debugging is left to those who enjoy it, which is not Thal-Gleamfall.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
